title: Barber Shop Website

requirements.text: Create a backend actor that stores barbershop information including services (name, description, price, duration), staff members (name, role, bio, photo placeholder), business hours, and contact details. Expose query functions to retrieve all of this data.

quotes: Give me a Barber Shop website

acceptanceCriteria: Backend stores a list of services with name, description, price, and duration fields
Backend stores staff member records with name, role, and bio
Backend stores business hours and contact info
All data is retrievable via query functions

requirements.text: Build a hero section with a full-width banner featuring the barbershop name, a bold tagline, and a prominent 'Book Now' call-to-action button that scrolls to the booking/contact section.

quotes: Give me a Barber Shop website

acceptanceCriteria: Hero section spans full viewport width
Barbershop name and tagline are prominently displayed
'Book Now' button is visible and scrolls to the contact/booking section on click

requirements.text: Create a Services section that displays all services fetched from the backend in a card grid layout, showing each service's name, description, price, and estimated duration.

quotes: Give me a Barber Shop website

acceptanceCriteria: Services are fetched from the backend and rendered in a responsive card grid
Each card shows service name, description, price, and duration
Section is accessible via page navigation

requirements.text: Create a Meet the Team section that displays staff members fetched from the backend in a card layout, showing each member's name, role, and bio, with an avatar placeholder image.

quotes: Give me a Barber Shop website

acceptanceCriteria: Staff cards are rendered from backend data
Each card displays name, role, bio, and a placeholder avatar
Section is visually distinct and consistently styled

requirements.text: Create a Gallery section showcasing barbershop atmosphere and haircut style images using generated static assets displayed in a responsive masonry or grid layout.

quotes: Give me a Barber Shop website

acceptanceCriteria: Gallery displays at least 4 images in a responsive grid
Images are served from frontend/public/assets/generated
Layout adapts gracefully to different screen sizes

requirements.text: Create a Contact & Hours section displaying the barbershop's address, phone number, email, and weekly business hours fetched from the backend. Include a simple appointment request form (name, phone, preferred date/time, service) that stores submissions in the backend.

quotes: Give me a Barber Shop website

acceptanceCriteria: Business hours and contact info are displayed from backend data
Appointment form collects name, phone, preferred date/time, and service
Submitted appointments are persisted in the backend
User sees a confirmation message after successful submission

requirements.text: Build a sticky top navigation bar with the barbershop logo/name and smooth-scroll links to all sections (Home, Services, Team, Gallery, Contact). Include a mobile hamburger menu for small screens.

quotes: Give me a Barber Shop website

acceptanceCriteria: Navigation bar is sticky and visible on all pages
All section links use smooth scrolling
Mobile hamburger menu expands/collapses navigation links
Active section is visually highlighted in the nav

requirements.text: Apply a cohesive dark, masculine barbershop visual theme throughout the site: deep charcoal/black backgrounds, warm gold and off-white accent colors, sharp serif or bold sans-serif typography, subtle texture overlays, and clean whitespace. Enforce this theme consistently across all sections and components.

quotes: Give me a Barber Shop website

acceptanceCriteria: All sections use the defined dark charcoal/black + gold color palette
Typography is consistent with a bold, premium barbershop aesthetic
No inconsistent color or font deviations across sections
Theme feels premium and professional on both desktop and mobile

requirements.text: Render all generated images (hero banner, gallery images, logo) as static assets from frontend/public/assets/generated throughout the site.

quotes: Give me a Barber Shop website

acceptanceCriteria: All generated images are loaded from /assets/generated/
Images are used in their respective sections (hero, gallery, logo)
No broken image links

constraints: All backend logic must remain in a single Motoko actor in backend/main.mo
Do not edit any files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
No real payment or external booking API integrations
nonGoals: Real-time booking calendar integration with third-party services

required: Dark atmospheric barbershop interior with leather chairs, warm Edison bulb lighting, brick walls, and vintage barber poles (hero-banner.dim_1400x700.png)
Circular barbershop logo mark featuring a classic straight razor and scissors crossed over a comb, gold on dark background (barber-logo.dim_256x256.png)
Classic men's haircut styled shot, side profile, clean fade on dark background (gallery-cut-1.dim_600x600.png)
Barber applying hot towel shave to a client in a vintage leather chair (gallery-shave-2.dim_600x600.png)
Close-up of barbershop tools: scissors, combs, clippers arranged on a marble surface (gallery-tools-3.dim_600x600.png)
Stylized portrait of a male barber in apron holding scissors, warm studio lighting (gallery-barber-4.dim_600x600.png)
Neutral male avatar silhouette illustration for staff placeholder (staff-avatar-placeholder.dim_256x256.png)
